title: TaggedShops
body:
**🛒 TaggedShops adds various color formats to your Shopkeeper names, and spoofs them using packet manipulation.**

**🏳‍🌈 Happy Pride Month!**

**📦 Dependencies (must-install)**

- [Shopkeepers](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/shopkeepers.80756/)
- [PacketEvents](https://modrinth.com/plugin/packetevents)

**ℹ️ Information**

- ⚠️ The plugin doesn't work on non-Paper Bukkit forks!
- A GitHub is not available, but the project is not obfuscated, you can decompile it freely.
- The plugin is licensed with CC-BY-NC 4.0, but you do NOT need to credit me.

**📝 Notes**

The usage is very simple - you just install this plugin along with its dependencies, make a shopkeeper and change its name like normal - except you can use chatcolors 👍

There are a lot supported formats, as the project uses [MatrixColorAPI](https://github.com/MatrixCreations/MatrixColorAPI/), which supports... gradients legacy colors and possibly more (check their readme).

It stores name per location, so when moving the villager, its colored name will have to be reassigned.
